svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Adaptive Persona Pipeline" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-759" dy="-111" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="0" tooltips="1" connect="0" arrows="0" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="220" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;" value="Trainee message" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="30" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ede9fe;strokeColor=#8b5cf6;fontColor=#4c1d95;fontSize=12;" value="LLM Assessor
Service" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="240" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e293b;strokeColor=#334155;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=12;" value="classification
confidence score" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="450" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e3a5f;strokeColor=#3b82f6;fontColor=#93c5fd;fontSize=12;" value="State Engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="660" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e3a5f;strokeColor=#3b82f6;fontColor=#93c5fd;fontSize=12;" value="Prompt Builder" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="870" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ede9fe;strokeColor=#8b5cf6;fontColor=#4c1d95;fontSize=12;" value="System prompt
injection" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="1080" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;" value="Persona LLM
responds" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="150" x="1290" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" edge="1" parent="1" source="2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;" target="3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" edge="1" parent="1" source="3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#8b5cf6;" target="4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" edge="1" parent="1" source="4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#334155;" target="5" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" edge="1" parent="1" source="5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#3b82f6;" target="6" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#3b82f6;" target="7" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" edge="1" parent="1" source="7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#8b5cf6;" target="8" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
